calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Shafai of Law Offices of John Z. Shafai telephone number 310-788-2889 appeared by telephone for Petitioner CBC Settlement Funding, LLC.
Respondent McCabe Mattingly telephone number 415-684-5769 in Propria Persona.
Nancy Mattingly (Mother of McCabe Mattingly) also present.

Ms. Mattingly explained that they are aware of the terms and that the structured settlement is in her Son's best interest. PETITIONER CBC SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is approved. Mr. Shafai is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
